underlying_goal: Implement ACK/NAK response generator (Jira ticket AR-19) for the alarm-receiver project, using the SIA prototype as a reference but with fresh architectural decisions
friction_detail: Claude initially tried to follow the Jira ticket specs and prototype architecture too closely; user had to redirect twice to approach with fresh eyes instead of blindly following AI-generated ticket specs or prototype structure.
brief_summary: User wanted to start implementing AR-19 (ACK/NAK response generator) with a fresh approach rather than following ticket specs or prototype verbatim; session was still in the exploration/planning phase when it ended.
